creator: @sethgolie
transcript: We're craving chicken, let's hit up Raising Cane's. Yeah man, I'll get the four tenders naked and then we'll get coleslaw, no toast, no fries and a Coke Zero. Okay, but what if we went to Popeyes, what would you order there? Yeah, I'd get the three blackened chicken tenders with the green beans and a Coke Zero. Dude, how do you always know what to order to stay on track with your fitness journey? Bro, you're not following Seth G yet? Shit, I better follow Seth G right now.
caption: Comment "FASTFOOD" for my fast food swap cheat sheet. Steal these two orders from Raising Canes & Popeyes. Raising Cane's order: 4 strips NAKED + coleslaw (no fries no toast) + Louisiana hot sauce + Coke Zero (395 calories 53 G protein). Popeyes order: 3 Blackened tenders + green beans + Coke Zero (430 calories 38 G protein).
ocr_summary: Raising Cane's: 1430 cal/54g protein (original) vs 395 cal/53g protein (swap). Popeyes: 1290 cal/34g protein (original) vs 430 cal/38g protein (swap)

swaps.swap_meal: 4 Strips NAKED + Coleslaw (no fries, no toast) + Louisiana hot sauce + Coke Zero
3 Blackened Chicken Tenders + Green Beans + Coke Zero

parsed.notes: Two-restaurant reel covering Raising Cane's and Popeyes. Both save 1000+ calories from typical orders.
